summary: COMPARISON two halves of the canvas. LEFT BLUE 'Unpolarized → filter': 9 randomly oriented short Arrow vectors feed into a 45° polarizer Circle, outputting 4 arrows at 45° — always 1/2 pass regardless of angle. RIGHT GREEN 'Polarized → filter': 6 horizontal polarized arrows feed into a rotatable polarizer whose angle is driven by ValueTracker dtheta_tr (tour 0,30,60,45,90,15°). always_redraw rebuilds the right filter, the output count = round(6·cos²(Δθ)), and the MathTex intensity label I_out = cos²(Δθ)·I₀. Contrasts the 'always 1/2' vs 'cos²' rules.
